@graph.title: Projection
@graph.description: Identifiers to projections into a coordinate system.
@graph.creator: Isabella Ruiz

@graph.definition: A measure of the length of a position or measured vector projected into the I-J (typically X-Y) plane of the coordinate system.
A measure of the length of a position or measured vector projected into the I-K (typically X-Z) plane of the coordinate system.
A measure of the length of a position or measured vector projected into the J-K (typically Y-Z) plane of the coordinate system.
